signals.headline: Cooper Flagg Passes Kon Knueppel as ROY Favorite After 45-Point Statement Game | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg Passes Kon Knueppel as ROY Favorite After 45-Point Statement Game | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Flagg overtook Knueppel in NBA Rookie of the Year odds (-250 vs. +180 on DraftKings) following a 45-point near triple-double on Sunday, marking the first time a rookie since Allen Iverson (and only teenager ever) averaged 45+ points, 5+ rebounds, and 5+ assists over two games[1][2][5].
